summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Health signal consistency between list and detail views. Backend tests: 23/23 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests: All health labels match between list and detail views. University of Florida correctly shows 'Active' (not 'At Risk'). Hero_status aligns with health_display. Signal suppression working for recent contact and completed playbooks.
critical_code_review_comments: school_pod.py classify_school_health() correctly accepts actual_days_since_contact and playbook_complete params for unified logic
List endpoint (line 349-369) correctly queries pod_action_events and playbook_progress for actual contact days per school
Detail endpoint (line 648-656) correctly computes health AFTER signal suppression with full context
hero_status (lines 661-676) is derived from unified health + signals - provides single source of truth for frontend
Frontend SchoolPod.js (line 487-489) correctly uses hero_status from backend, not independently computed
SupportPod.js SchoolRow (lines 278-279) correctly displays health_label from backend response
seed_data_creation: None - used existing athlete_1 with 7 schools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Health signal consistency P0 bug is FIXED. Key verification points: 1) List endpoint /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/schools returns health field that matches detail endpoint /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/school/{program_id}. 2) hero_status.label does not contradict health_display.label. 3) University of Florida shows 'active' health (recent contact), not 'at_risk'. 4) Emory shows 'at_risk' with 'Critical' hero (27d no contact). 5) Signal suppression works: recent contact (<=3d) suppresses critical/high signals; completed playbook suppresses critical signals.

University of Florida School Pod - ACTIVE status, ON TRACK hero, Contacted today VERIFIED
Emory University School Pod - AT RISK status, CRITICAL hero, 27d no contact VERIFIED
